title: Wardens Stuff
description: A basic resource package that allows you to get unique wanders items.
body:
###  For correct work you need Optifine or [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
This resource pack gives you the opportunity to get unique items.

> To do this, rename any axe or sword to:
> - For the Giraffe staff - Girastaff
> 
> - For the Moddy scythe - ModdyS
> 
> - For the PWGood sign - PWStop
##
Subscribe to my [telegram channel](https://t.me/olarcyzm), you can also contact me there


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The bug with the PWGood sign was fixed

</details>

## 
Made specially for MineShield players
